name: Cookie: Crispie Treats (No Bake)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups M&M's Plain or Peanut Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt together marshmallows, margarine, peanut butter, and salt in a heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally until smooth.
2. Pour the melted mixture over the combined cereal and candies, tossing lightly to coat everything thoroughly.
3. Using greased fingers, gently roll the mixture into 1-1/2-inch balls.
4. Place the balls on waxed paper and allow to cool at room temperature until set.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
